Volunteer & Visit
When women heal, communities heal. And you can be part of that transformation.
Volunteer
Our volunteers are an essential part of the Thistle Farms family. From assembling candle wicks and tagging apparel to gardening, decorating for the holidays, or helping in The Café, your time and talent directly support women on their healing journey. We welcome individuals, small groups, and corporate teams alike. You’ll leave with a deeper understanding of our mission and why we believe that love is the most powerful force for change in the world.
﻿Complete the volunteer form below, and we’ll connect with you about available opportunities and current needs.
Sign Up
Visit
Whether you’re visiting Nashville or call it home, we’d love to welcome you to Thistle Farms. Come take a guided walk through our main campus to learn about our two-year residential program and see our justice enterprise in action, including The Café and The Shop. Along the way, you’ll hear inspiring stories of hope and restoration from program graduates.
﻿Fill out the inquiry form below, and we’ll be in touch to arrange your visit.
Please note that guided visits are only available Monday-Friday, 8am-3pm.

meta.meta_description: For 25 years, Thistle Farms has lit a pathway of healing and hope for women survivors of trafficking, prostitution, and addiction.
